generated_oml:
instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor modeled in BIM environment for room monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2ConcentrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration sensor modeled in BIM environment for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting level sensor for monitoring ambient light conditions in BIM environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor
]

instance CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2ConcentrationSensor
]

instance LightingLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataExchangeEnabler
]

instance CO2ConcentrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 levels from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2ConcentrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataExchangeEnabler
]

instance LightingLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting levels from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataExchangeEnabler
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling HVAC valve in Building Control System"
]

instance LightingControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting systems in BIM environment"
]

instance BCSComponentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model for Building Control System components including sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEngine
]

instance MDEEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering engine for automatic generation of Digital Twin artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware enabling real-time data exchange between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of building systems using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive maintenance and energy optimization using historical and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing actionable insights for Facility Managers to optimize building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight, AdjustHVACValveAction, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of building performance metrics"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for equipment failure and energy consumption trends"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable recommendations for facility management decisions"
]

instance AdjustHVACValveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC valve based on DT analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized hub coordinating multiple Digital Twin instances for building management"
]

instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain requiring integration of static models with runtime data for life cycle optimization"
    base:contains DTFramework, RoomTemperatureSensor, HVACValveActuator, CO2ConcentrationSensor, LightingLevelSensor, LightingControllerActuator, BCSComponentModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facility Managers issue control commands through the DT interface to Building Control Systems (BCS), with feedback loops confirming command execution status and system responses to ensure accurate physical infrastructure operation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts, maintaining temporal consistency for operational monitoring and control without explicit frequency specifications."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics, where the DT Framework serves as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers to define sensors, actuators, and controllers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate structured representations and automatic deployment artifacts; real-time data exchange ensures synchronization with physical systems, interactive visualization enables Facility Manager monitoring and control, and modular extension points support custom service integration for continuous evolution."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation uses the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to quantify alignment between digital and physical states, complemented by architectural soundness checks during model transformation. Case studies in Section V assess data synchronization accuracy, model correctness, and real-time fidelity through empirical evaluation protocols."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto form the technical network infrastructure, providing IoT connectivity and digital twin management for real-time data exchange between physical assets and the digital twin, with the DT Framework acting as a central hub for bidirectional communication."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is addressed through standardized extension points in the modular architecture, supporting integration with external systems and enterprise platforms as part of nonfunctional requirements, though specific data exchange protocols are not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework utilizes standardized extension points within its modular architecture to facilitate the integration of custom services and analytics; however, specific industry standards or compliance frameworks are not explicitly detailed in the document."
]
